title: Ireland seizes 750,000 illegal medicines after surge in small online deliveries [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: A significant portion of the seized products are GLP‑1 substances, such as semaglutide and tirzepatide, normally authorised for diabetes and weight management
summary_public: A significant portion of the seized products are GLP‑1 substances, such as semaglutide and tirzepatide, normally authorised for diabetes and weight management
